title: Home
text:
Lee Chemical Biology Lab
Chemical biology and molecular design for disease-relevant protein regulation.
We develop chemical and biological strategies to interrogate and modulate disease-relevant protein function, with current emphasis on extracellular protein degradation, retinal degeneration, enzyme-responsive fluorescent probes, and AI-assisted peptide/protein design.
